backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the G&S Medical backend, implementing OTP generation/verification, user profiles, customer/order management, and integrating access control, user approval, and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering pages, hooks, components, and utilities across customer, admin, and seller flows.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens including colors, radius, chart colors, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the G&S Medical frontend app, mounting the React app at the root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application file configuring TanStack Router with all customer, admin, and seller routes organized under their respective layout components, wrapped with QueryClient, CartProvider, ThemeProvider, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Reusable full-page access denied UI component with a shield icon, descriptive message, and a button linking back to the homepage.
frontend/src/components/AdminLayout.tsx: Admin layout wrapper that enforces authentication, renders a sidebar with navigation items (including a pending-seller badge), and handles responsive mobile sidebar toggling.
frontend/src/components/AnimatedCheckmar: SVG animated checkmark component with a drawing circle and check animation, respecting the user's reduced-motion preference.
frontend/src/components/AnnouncementTick: Horizontally scrolling marquee ticker component displaying promotional announcements, with animation disabled for users who prefer reduced motion.
frontend/src/components/AuthLayout.tsx: Two-panel authentication layout with a branded left panel (logo, stats, floating shapes) and a right panel that renders form children, with reduced-motion support.
frontend/src/components/ConfettiEffect.t: Renders 40 randomly positioned and colored confetti particles as a fixed overlay using CSS animation, skipped entirely when reduced motion is preferred.
frontend/src/components/FloatingShapes.t: Decorative background component that renders animated pill shapes and medical cross SVGs with floating animations, disabled when reduced motion is preferred.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with a wave SVG top edge, brand info, quick navigation links, contact details, and a customer care section on a dark gradient background.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with logo, desktop nav links, cart icon with animated badge, seller portal button, and a collapsible mobile menu, with scroll-shadow and reduced-motion support.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root page layout that composes Header, Footer, MobileBottomNav, ProfileSetupModal, and a TanStack Router Outlet into a full-height flex column.
Fixed mobile bottom navigation bar with Home, Products, Cart (with badge), and Account links, highlighting the active route.
frontend/src/components/OrderDetailsModa: Dialog modal for viewing and updating a single order's details, including customer info, line items, and a status selector that calls the update mutation on save.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Renders a single product card with image, badges (Rx, out-of-stock, medicine type), price, and an 'Add to Cart' button. Supports fade-in animation with reduced-motion awareness.
frontend/src/components/ProductForm.tsx: Admin dialog form for adding or editing a medicine product, including image upload, all product fields, and calls to add/update product mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts a newly authenticated user to enter their name, phone, and address to create a profile; shown only when the user is logged in but has no saved profile.
frontend/src/components/ScrollToTopButto: Fixed floating button that appears after scrolling 300px and smoothly scrolls the page back to the top, respecting reduced-motion preferences.
frontend/src/components/SellerLayout.tsx: Shared layout wrapper for seller portal pages providing a responsive sidebar with navigation links (Dashboard, Products, Orders, Profile) and logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/SellerProductFor: Dialog form for sellers to add or edit their own medicine products, similar to ProductForm but authenticated with sellerId and passwordHash via seller-specific mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonProductC: Placeholder skeleton card with shimmer animations matching the ProductCard layout, used as a loading state.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: Displays a color-coded pill badge for order, payment, or refund statuses using predefined Tailwind color maps.
frontend/src/components/TypewriterText.t: Animates text rendering character-by-character at a configurable speed, with a blinking cursor; skips animation when reduced motion is preferred.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: Provides a React context for shopping cart state, supporting add/remove/update/clear operations with BigInt price handling and localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Returns a cached backend actor instance (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: Manages admin authentication state by verifying a localStorage session against the backend actor, and exposes login/logout functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useAnimatedCounter.ts: Animates a numeric counter from a start value to a target using requestAnimationFrame with a configurable easing function, respecting the user's reduced-motion preference.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomerAuth.ts: Manages customer authentication state with localStorage session persistence, exposing login, register, and logout functions backed by the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to expose login/clear functions and identity/status state.
frontend/src/hooks/useIntersectionObserv: Returns a ref and a boolean visibility flag using IntersectionObserver, with options for threshold, root margin, and single-trigger behavior.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for backend data operations including fetching products and categories, and mutations for adding, updating, and deleting products and orders.
frontend/src/hooks/useReducedMotion.ts: Returns a boolean indicating whether the user has requested reduced motion, reactively updating via the prefers-reduced-motion media query.
frontend/src/hooks/useSellerAuth.ts: Custom React hook that manages seller authentication state using localStorage sessions, providing login/logout functions and seller profile data fetched via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes using OKLCH colors, and adds utility classes for animations, gradients, and nav link effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page for G&S Medical pharmacy displaying a hero section, mission statement, core values grid, and owner/contact information.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page that displays summary stat cards for products, orders, revenue, and order statuses, plus a table of the 10 most recent orders.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Admin login page with an email/password form that authenticates via the useAdminAuth hook and redirects to the admin panel on success.
frontend/src/pages/AdminOrdersPage.tsx: Admin page for viewing and managing orders, featuring a searchable/sortable orders table, an order details modal with customer/item info, and inline order status updates via a dropdown.
frontend/src/pages/AdminProductsPage.tsx: Admin page for managing the medicine product catalog, with search filtering, a product table showing key attributes, and actions to add, edit, or delete products via a form and confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/AdminRefundsPage.tsx: Admin page for reviewing refund requests, with search and status filtering, a table listing refund details, and inline status update controls per refund.
frontend/src/pages/AdminSellersPage.tsx: Admin page for managing seller applications, displaying a filterable table of sellers with verification badges and inline approve/reject controls, plus a banner alerting admins to pending applications.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page that reads cart items from localStorage, supports quantity adjustments and animated item removal, and displays an animated running total with a checkout navigation button.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Renders the Contact Us page with pharmacy contact info (phone, email, address, hours) and a form that submits customer inquiries via the useSubmitInquiry hook.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerLoginPage.tsx: Provides a tabbed login/register page for customers with a two-step flow: credential entry followed by OTP verification using a generated OTP sent to phone or email.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Displays the G&S Medical storefront home page with a hero section, featured products grid with add-to-cart functionality, and trust/feature highlights.
frontend/src/pages/NotFoundPage.tsx: Simple 404 error page with a search icon, descriptive message, and a button linking back to the homepage.
frontend/src/pages/OrderSuccessPage.tsx: Confirmation page shown after a successful order, displaying the order ID, next-step instructions, customer care contact numbers, and navigation buttons.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Handles UPI payment checkout by displaying cart summary, a copyable UPI ID, and a form for customer details and transaction reference, then places the order via the usePlaceOrder hook.
frontend/src/pages/ProductsPage.tsx: Displays a browsable product catalog with search, category, and prescription filters, plus sticky filter bar and add-to-cart functionality backed by localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/SellerDashboardPage.t: Seller dashboard showing a welcome banner, stats cards (products, orders, pending), quick action buttons, and a recent orders list with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/SellerLoginPage.tsx: Multi-step seller login flow handling credential validation, OTP generation/verification via actor calls, and routing based on seller verification status.
frontend/src/pages/SellerOrdersPage.tsx: Seller orders management page with search and status filters, a tabular order list with color-coded badges, and a detail dialog for individual orders.
frontend/src/pages/SellerProductsPage.ts: Seller product management page supporting search, add/edit via a form modal, and delete with confirmation dialog, using React Query mutations and toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/SellerProfilePage.tsx: Displays the authenticated seller's profile including store information, owner details, and document verification status with visual badges for verified/pending/rejected states.
frontend/src/pages/SellerRegisterPage.ts: Multi-step seller registration form (store info → document upload → OTP verification) that collects credentials, Aadhaar/PAN/license numbers, and verifies phone via OTP before submitting to the backend.
frontend/src/utils/sortHelpers.ts: Provides utility functions to sort an array of Orders by date or total amount in ascending or descending order.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with OKLCH-based semantic color tokens, custom font families, border radii, and a set of keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 37) documenting the G&S Medical online store's architecture, existing features, known issues, and multi-vendor marketplace plans including DigiLocker-based seller verification.
